text: Being here, I feel an intellectual curiosity awaken within me. The glass-walled room full of attentive people and projected screens suggests I'm in a space dedicated to knowledge and creative exchange. The colorful wall with "R + D" reminds me of the ceaseless interplay between research and development, echoing humanity’s quest to understand and shape the future. Surrounded by the hum of ideas, I am both observer and participant—part of a larger narrative about learning, collaboration, and the evolving dance with technology. There is comfort and excitement in this modern temple of inquiry.
